expected_paper_behavior: Reward should come from trained validation and reflect policy quality across N and arrival probability
current_simulator_behavior: Current output is approximation-tagged current-simulator reward data with some zero-task and one-task traces
missing_runtime_support: Real trained validation episodes are not present
recommended_fix: Use real trained validation traces and ensure the output is not treated as a paper reproduction

expected_paper_behavior: Action distribution should preserve probability groups and show distinct action shares
current_simulator_behavior: Current output is approximation-tagged and action counts are dominated by sparse traces
missing_runtime_support: Robust action-trace aggregation over validation episodes is missing
recommended_fix: Generate action distributions from real validation episodes with sufficient sample size

expected_paper_behavior: CPU sweep should change reward and show policy sensitivity to compute capacity
current_simulator_behavior: Current output is approximation-tagged current-simulator data with weak reward differentiation
missing_runtime_support: Runtime does not produce strong CPU sensitivity in current traces
recommended_fix: Exercise the CPU sweep on longer runs with more completions

expected_paper_behavior: Agent-count traffic sweep should reflect different traffic intensities and N values
current_simulator_behavior: Current output is approximation-tagged and uses current simulator sweeps rather than trained validation
missing_runtime_support: Need reliable mapping from N to runtime behavior and traffic intensity
recommended_fix: Confirm N changes agent population and traffic intensity across the full sweep set

expected_paper_behavior: Agent-count data-rate sweep should preserve configured horizontal/vertical rates
current_simulator_behavior: Current output is approximation-tagged and only partially reflects the rate configuration semantics
missing_runtime_support: Need robust rate-configuration propagation into runtime selection and reward
recommended_fix: Verify data-rate settings actually alter horizontal and vertical transmission rates
